about.heading: About M365Mutator
about.body: M365Mutator connects to a Microsoft 365 tenant via Microsoft Graph and lets an operator update users, send/reply to mail, manage calendar items, and manage OneDrive/SharePoint documents.

gettingStarted.heading: Getting started
steps: Open Settings and enter the Entra ID app registration's tenant ID, client ID, and a client secret or certificate.
Use Verify Graph Connection to confirm the credentials work.
Use Targets to choose which users, mailboxes, or sites to act on.
Use the Users, Mail, Calendar, and Files tabs to run mutations against those targets.

permissions.heading: Required Graph permissions
permissions.body: Each tab lists the application permission it needs. Grant only what you plan to use, and have a tenant admin consent to it in the Entra ID app registration.

repository.heading: Documentation & issues
repository.body: Additional documentation and issue tracking for M365Mutator are available in the GitHub repository:
